_note: Content block for /solutions/wholesale (#605). Use-case page: wholesalers/buyers enter sustainable markets by sourcing verified inventory and creating their own designs from it in the partner studio, each piece carrying a Digital Product Passport. Lift into the CMS later without changing the component.

hero.title: Source verified. Sell sustainable.
hero.subtitle: Browse verified inventory from our maker network, design your own pieces in the partner studio, and sell into sustainable markets. Every SKU carries a Digital Product Passport.

shift.title: Buyers are being asked to prove it.
shift.body: Green-claims rules (EU ESPR, the Digital Product Passport mandate) turn 'sustainable' from a label into a receipt. Most wholesale platforms move orders — they can't trace a material or its maker. JYT starts from verified inventory, so the proof is built in.

steps.title: From verified inventory to your own line.

items.title: Browse verified inventory
items.body: Source from traceable materials and vetted makers — each lot tied to its origin, artisan, and certification. Filter for what you can stand behind.

items.title: Design it in the partner studio
items.body: Use the partner studio to spin up your own products from that inventory — variants, pricing, and tech details — without a sample room or a PLM contract.

items.title: Sell with a passport on every piece
items.body: Each SKU ships with an EU ESPR-ready Digital Product Passport — provenance buyers and regulators can verify. Sustainable shelf-space, earned, not claimed.

sell.title: Branded, traceable, on every channel.
sell.subtitle: Your products carry the passport and your label across every sales channel. Inventory, compliance, and orders are managed in one place — from your storefront to the partner network.

items.title: Branded storefront, on your domain
items.body: Your own headless storefront with a custom domain, themed to your label. Every SKU pulls from the same production data and carries its passport.

items.title: Sell within the partner network
items.body: Other JYT partners can discover and buy your line through the network — a built-in wholesale channel with traceable inventory and automated compliance.

items.title: Orders & fulfilment, unified
items.body: Every channel feeds into one order dashboard — capture payment, fulfil, and manage returns without re-keying between sales surfaces.

items.title: No greenwashing risk
items.body: You only sell what the inventory can prove. Provenance is the default, not an afterthought.

items.title: Your label, our rail
items.body: Create your own branded designs from verified stock — you own the line, JYT runs the production and traceability underneath.

items.title: Open the network
items.body: 150+ vetted artisans across EU, India & Australia become your supply base — coordinated over WhatsApp and a mobile portal.

items.title: Transparent, atelier-friendly pricing
items.body: No enterprise contract, no sales-gate. Clear pricing, self-serve — unlike the wholesale incumbents.

cta.title: Bring verified inventory to your buyers.
cta.body: We’ll walk you through sourcing verified stock, designing from it, and shipping with a passport on every piece.
